title: verbena neomexicana var. hirtella
intro: Verbena neomexicana var. hirtella, also known as New Mexico verbena, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of volatile oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Verbena neomexicana var. hirtella can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
